title: Federalist No. 10
description: A Wikisource source card for Federalist No. 10 and older-student civics reading.

pages.text: Federalist No. 10 is a key primary source for studying factions, representation, republican government, and arguments for the Constitution.
Use this source for close reading of political vocabulary, argument structure, claim-evidence reasoning, and historical context.
Wikisource hosts public-domain and freely licensed texts. Check the linked work page for its specific license and source notes before assigning or mirroring.
